activities_projects.title: Dimensions of Health Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand physical, mental, and social aspects of health
steps: Write definitions of physical, mental, and social health
Give two real-life examples for each type
Explain how all three aspects together define overall health
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the multidimensional concept of health
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of explanations and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Healthy Lifestyle Observation
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate lifestyle habits that affect health
steps: Observe your daily routine for three days
Record habits such as diet, sleep, exercise, and screen time
Identify which habits promote good health and which need improvement
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness of lifestyle choices affecting health
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and reflection in observations (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Environment and Health Study
steps: Observe two different locations in your neighbourhood
Note cleanliness, waste disposal, and air quality
Explain how these environmental factors can affect people’s health
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students relate environmental conditions with disease risk
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of observations and explanations (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Communicable Disease Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Identify causes and prevention of infectious diseases
steps: Select three communicable diseases such as measles, cholera, or malaria
Identify the pathogen responsible for each disease
Describe how each disease spreads and its preventive measures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand transmission and prevention of infectious diseases
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of causes and preventive steps (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Non-Communicable Disease Awareness
steps: Choose three non-communicable diseases such as diabetes, obesity, or asthma
Write the symptoms of each disease
Suggest lifestyle changes to prevent them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand causes and prevention of lifestyle diseases

activities_projects.title: Immunity and Vaccination Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand how vaccines help protect the body
steps: Define immunity in your own words
List five vaccines given during childhood
Explain how vaccines help the immune system fight diseases
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of vaccination in disease prevention

activities_projects.title: Antibiotic Awareness Activity
steps: Write what antibiotics are and what diseases they treat
Explain why antibiotics do not work against viral infections
List precautions to prevent antibiotic resistance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn responsible use of antibiotics
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct explanation of antibiotic usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Disease Prevention Poster Project
steps: Design a poster showing ways to prevent communicable diseases
Include hygiene, vaccination, and clean surroundings
Present the poster to classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students communicate public health messages creatively
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and accuracy of health information (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Community Health Survey
activities_projects.objective: Study common health issues in the community
steps: Interview three people about common diseases in the area
Record their answers about symptoms and prevention
Summarize the findings in a short report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect textbook knowledge with real-life situations
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of survey data and conclusions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: School Health Awareness Plan
activities_projects.objective: Plan strategies to promote health in school
steps: Identify three major health risks among students
Suggest measures such as hygiene campaigns or sports activities
Prepare a short plan for improving student health
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop problem-solving and health awareness skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Feasibility and clarity of proposed solutions (10 marks)
